substep.title: Detect Mode
substep.action: Check whether the question tool is available in the current capability set. Available → INTERACTIVE mode. Absent → AUTONOMOUS mode. The remaining substeps branch on this.

check.action:
Parse the questions array from the dispatch prompt. Each entry must carry question_text and expected_output_shape. If the array is missing, empty, or any entry lacks a required field, emit this error to stdout and stop:
ERROR: Missing or malformed dispatch field '{field}'. The dispatching caller failed to supply complete dispatch context. No research performed.

Collect the user's question(s) from the conversation. For each question, confirm it is specific enough to compose a focused child prompt — a question needs a clear WHAT and a usable WHERE (scope). If a question is too vague to dispatch, ask the user to sharpen it (one question at a time) using the question tool: name what's ambiguous and offer the most likely interpretations with the recommended one first.
